programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: A Beach Home Blowout Renovation on Pawleys Island, SC
programs.desc: A Carolina family finds a deal on their new beach house on Pawleys Island, S.C.; a massive overhaul of the floor plan and expansions on both floors guarantees room for their growing family.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Making a Splash on the Brunswick Islands
programs.desc: A beach-loving family from Raleigh, N.C., looks for their own slice of waterfront heaven on the coast; after a lifetime of working hard, they finally get the chance to make their dreams come true.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Destined for a Renovation in Destin, Florida
programs.desc: Having split their time between Nashville, Tenn., and Destin, Fla., a couple hopes to get their sons out into the sunshine permanently.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Poolside Paradise in Cocoa Beach, Florida
programs.desc: Tired of Denver cold, a family finds a place in Cocoa Beach, Fla., but they want to add a poolside oasis and custom spa.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Renovations on First Home in Madeira Beach, Florida
programs.desc: First-time homeowners from the Jersey shore are looking to escape the cold and find their piece of paradise in Madeira Beach, Florida. They're hoping to find a home with water views that they can renovate as a place to raise their family.

programs.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programs.sub_title: Beaufort, North Carolina Beach House Remodel
programs.desc: Hoping to create memories, a couple from Durham is searching for a Beaufort, NC beach home to share with family and rent out. But with access to fishing, boating, and beautiful beaches driving up prices, their dream depends on finding an affordable fixer.
